definition: bring something into existence
simple_explanation: To 'create' is to make something new that did not exist before.

definition: join together so as to provide a link
simple_explanation: To 'connect' means to tie, bond, or link things together.

definition: keep something from happening
simple_explanation: To 'prevent' means to stop an event or action before it can occur.

definition: make or become better
simple_explanation: To 'improve' means to elevate something to a higher state or standard.

definition: travel through an unfamiliar area to learn about it
simple_explanation: To 'explore' is to search, look around, and learn about new things.

definition: successfully reach a desired goal
distractor_definitions: give up on a challenge midway
simple_explanation: To 'achieve' is to complete or win something through hard work.

definition: protect against danger or risk
simple_explanation: To 'secure' means to lock down or safely guard from any harm.

definition: give assistance or encouragement to
simple_explanation: To 'support' means to back someone up or help hold things up.

definition: fully choose from a number of options
simple_explanation: To 'select' is to pick the best choice among several alternatives.

definition: decide upon look and function of something
simple_explanation: To 'design' is to carefully sketch or outline a scheme and structure.

definition: easily understood or done
simple_explanation: Something 'simple' is straightforward to grasp and lacks complexity.

definition: engaging in physical or mental pursuit
simple_explanation: Being 'active' means you are busy doing things rather than resting.

definition: construct by putting parts together
simple_explanation: To 'build' is to assemble raw pieces to construct a larger structure.

definition: time or events yet to come
simple_explanation: The 'future' is the period of time that lies ahead of us.

definition: bring to mind an awareness of past
simple_explanation: To 'remember' is to pull a thought or file back into active memory.

definition: make ready for use or consideration
simple_explanation: To 'prepare' is to get everything set and ready before a task begins.

definition: regard something as likely to happen
simple_explanation: To 'expect' is to wait for or anticipate something you feel will arrive.

definition: bring together into one place
simple_explanation: To 'gather' is to bring scattered items or people into a single group.

definition: keep safe from damage or injury
simple_explanation: To 'protect' is to shelter or defend something or someone from harm.

definition: person with bond of mutual affection
simple_explanation: A 'friend' is someone you care about and enjoy spending time with.
